title: phegopteris axillaris
intro: Phegopteris axillaris, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The plant's medicinal properties are due to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Phegopteris axillaris is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
